case_title: GOSCH, DONALD JR. VS SEDLOCK, GREGORY C. C/O CITY & COUNTY OF S/F

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,198.34 FILED BY GOSCH, DONALD  JR. AS TO DEFENDANT SEDLOCK, GREGORY C. C/O CITY & COUNTY OF S/F ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO GREGORY SEDLOCK BADGE #-C341 CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOSCH, DONALD  JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEDLOCK, GREGORY C. C/O CITY & COUNTY OF S/F $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $371.00, DEFENDANT MUST RETURN PLAINTIFF'S MIXMASTER, VCR AND COMFORTER(S) TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT SEDLOCK, GREGORY C. C/O CITY & COUNTY OF S/F HEARING SET FOR NOV-16-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF NOV-16-1995, GRANTED
AFTER NOV. 16, 1995, $60 PER MONTH DUE TO PLTF TO BE POSTMARKED BY THE 16TH OF EACH MONTH.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SEDLOCK, GREGORY C. C/O CITY & COUNTY OF S/F
